name: Fishers Oysters
description: Fishers Oysters is a First Nations oyster business on Quandamooka Country, growing native rock oysters and caring for old reef beds around Terangerri, Minjerribah and Moreton Bay.

hero.heading: Oysters grown on Quandamooka Country
hero.subheading: Native rock oysters from Terangerri, Minjerribah and Moreton Bay

about.intro: Fishers Oysters is a First Nations oyster business working on Quandamooka Country.
about.mission: To grow native rock oysters, care for old reef beds, and bring more local families into paid aquaculture work.

values.title: Country First
values.description: Working the leases in ways that keep Sea Country healthy.

values.title: Community Grown
values.description: Keeping ownership and work close to the families connected to these waters.

values.title: Quality Driven
values.description: Native rock oysters grown in the clean tidal water of Moreton Bay.

values.title: Knowledge Sharing
values.description: Teaching the work on the leases, with Elders and marine science both in the conversation.

offerings.title: Grow and Supply Oysters
offerings.description: Native rock oysters grown on working leases in Moreton Bay.

offerings.title: Oyster Tours
offerings.description: Walk the leases, taste oysters, and hear how the work happens on Country.

offerings.title: Work on Country
offerings.description: Training and paid work for people who want to learn aquaculture on the leases.

quote.text: The leases have to feed people, employ people, and look after Country.

cta.heading: Support Our Oysters, Support Our Community
cta.text: For oyster orders, tours, or project enquiries, send us a message.

contact.address: Quandamooka Country, North Stradbroke Island (Minjerribah), Moreton Bay, Queensland
